description_long: This object is a bolt-action rifle with a classic wooden stock and a matte black metal barrel. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, extending from the butt to the fore-end, providing a solid grip and shoulder support. The receiver and bolt assembly are visible, with a prominent bolt handle on the right side, indicating manual cycling of the action. The rifle features simple iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, suitable for basic aiming. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly defined beneath the receiver, and the magazine appears to be internal, integrated into the stock. The overall finish is utilitarian, with a combination of dark wood and blackened steel, giving it a traditional and reliable appearance.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and matte black metal barrel, featuring iron sights and an internal magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden stock, barrel, trigger guard, and bolt handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, barrel, and the absence of the bolt handle on this side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel.
